reviews.review_msg: She is such an AMAZING prof!  Lectures were a pleasure to attend. She made a difficult and dry course into something that was not only bearable but actually enjoyable! Most assigned readings were always current, relevant, and interesting. I would def take another class from her again!

Very nice, and truly informative during lectures. Many questions brought from the readings will be clearly identified from her lectures. She doesn't go off-topic and is very helpful in clarifying anything.

If you are looking for an upper level Cmns class at SFU I HIGHLY recommend taking a class with Fiona Jeffries. I had her this semester for CMNS 444 - Political Economy of International Communication and it was by far one of my favorite classes ever taken at SFU. Engaging, thought provoking, inclusive, up-to-date and discussion/project orientated.
Fiona is an awesome prof! She's really engaged and helpful.
She's really nice but I thought the material could have been better focused.  Just seemed a bit broad.
Fionna was great, she listened to the classes concerns, was always there for help and really interesting to listen to. One of my favorite profs to date!
very friendly prof. very nice overall. just that. she doesnt use webct. and does not give u update on the mark.

Fiona is amazing! I took qualitative with her and she is so good at teaching all the techniques and her assignments were fun as well. Take your research courses with Fiona she is so helpful and makes an effort to meet one on one with all her students.
